data.title: TREMBLANT UNVEILS ITS SUMMER PROGRAM
data.description: In Mont-Tremblant, Quebec, a summer festival highlighting the beauty of the outdoors, music, and nature is set to captivate visitors. Bloomafest Tremblant will take place on May 8 and 9, offering a dynamic two-day program to commemorate the spring season. Guests can expect a celebration filled with music, outdoor activities, and appreciation for nature. This event promises to showcase the essence of Tremblant's charm, attracting a large number of attendees eager to partake in the festivities.

data.title: Teleflex Stock Surges Over 8% In Pre-Market Trading: Here's Why
data.description: Shares of Teleflex Inc. (NYSE: TFX) surged by 8.22% to $135.00 in pre-market trading on Wednesday following a joint bid by private equity firms CVC Capital Partners and GTCR to take the medical device company private. The offer is currently being assessed, with no guarantee of finalization. TFX concluded the regular session with a 5.46% drop at $124.75. CVC Capital Partners and GTCR have not yet commented on the bid. The bid came after activist investor Irenic Capital Management criticized Teleflex's board for not engaging with potential buyers. CVC, listed in Amsterdam, has been actively pursuing acquisitions in 2026. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

At least 11 drones carried out an attack on Syzran on Wednesday morning, reported the official representative of the Investigative Committee, Svetlana Petrenko. A criminal case has been initiated for a terrorist act.

data.title: Netflix Hunting For 'Steal': Bidding On Repossessed LA Studio For Peanuts
data.description: The popular streaming service Netflix Inc. (NASDAQ: NFLX) is considering acquiring a historic studio lot in Los Angeles at a discounted price, signaling their shift towards owning production assets amid market changes. They are in discussions to purchase Radford Studio Center, which was repossessed by lenders led by Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. (NYSE: GS). While the final price is still being negotiated, it may be less than one-third of its $1.85 billion valuation in 2021. As of March 31, 2026, Netflix had $12.26 billion in cash and equivalents. The decline in Los Angeles studio real estate values, influenced by factors such as higher interest rates and decreased production after the 2023 strikes by writers and actors, has created a buying opportunity for Netflix. The deal has not been finalized yet, but this move showcases Netflix's strategy to invest in production infrastructure.

data.title: Anaergia Technologies LLC to Supply Vanguard Renewables with Advanced Anaerobic Digestion Technology
data.description: Anaergia Inc., a company listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: ANRG; OTCQX: ANRGF), has secured an $8 million contract through its subsidiary Anaergia Technologies LLC with Vanguard Renewables. The contract is for the implementation of Anaergia's technology and equipment at an advanced anaerobic digestion facility in Minnesota. Anaergia Technologies will provide a complete solution, incorporating its established process technology.

data.title: American Parkinson Disease Association Welcomes Three Distinguished Leaders to National Board of Directors
data.description: Three distinguished professionals have joined the National Board of the American Parkinson Disease Association (APDA) to contribute their healthcare expertise, creative vision, and lived experience towards advancing the organization's mission. The new board members are set to play a vital role in shaping the future of APDA and bringing fresh perspectives to the table. The appointment announcement was made in New York on April 22, 2026. This move underscores APDA's commitment to furthering its cause and benefitting from diverse talents and backgrounds.

data.title: New five-star awards for Scania in Euro NCAP
data.description: In SÖDERTÄLJE, Sweden, on April 22, 2026, Scania's P-series cab P4x2 distribution and P6x2 utility, along with Scania's L4x2 distribution, have attained top ratings in the Euro NCAP's Safer Trucks program. This recognition signifies the exceptional safety standards upheld by these vehicles, setting a benchmark for others in the industry. The achievement is especially noteworthy as it pertains to critical safety features, emphasizing Scania's commitment to excellence in manufacturing.
